rationale: Educ. Code §12.015 governs appointment and composition of a school district charter commission. It is unrelated to homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 12.015. CHARTER COMMISSION. (a) Not later than the 30th day after the date of receipt of a petition or adoption of a resolution under Section 12.014, the board of trustees of the school district shall appoint 15 residents of the district to serve on the commission to frame a charter for the district.
_note: No conflict. The cited rule addresses school district charter commission formation and is unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
